title: Parking Rates
content: Hourly rate: $3 per hour. Daily maximum: $25. Weekly pass: $100. Monthly pass: $150. EV charging spots have an additional $1 per hour surcharge.

title: Hours of Operation
content: The parking garage is open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Staffed hours are Monday through Friday from 7:00 AM to 10:00 PM, and Saturday through Sunday from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM.

title: Location
content: The parking garage is located at 123 Main Street, Downtown. It is accessible from both Main Street and Oak Avenue entrances. GPS coordinates: 41.8781, -87.6298.

title: Capacity
content: Total capacity is 500 spots across 5 levels. Level 1: 80 spots (including 10 handicap). Level 2: 100 spots. Level 3: 120 spots. Level 4: 120 spots. Level 5: 80 spots (including 20 EV charging spots).

title: Reservation Policy
content: Reservations can be made up to 7 days in advance. Minimum reservation duration is 1 hour. Maximum reservation duration is 24 hours. All reservations require administrator approval before confirmation.

title: Cancellation Policy
content: Free cancellation up to 2 hours before the reservation start time. Late cancellations incur a $5 fee. No-shows are charged the full reservation amount.

title: Payment Methods
content: Accepted payment methods: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and cash at staffed kiosks. Prepayment is required for all reservations.

title: EV Charging
content: 20 EV charging spots are available on Level 5. Chargers support Level 2 (7.2 kW) and DC Fast Charging (50 kW). Charging is billed at $0.30 per kWh in addition to parking fees.

title: Handicap Parking
content: 10 handicap-accessible spots are available on Level 1 near the elevator. A valid handicap placard or license plate is required. These spots cannot be reserved and are available on a first-come, first-served basis.

title: Rules and Regulations
content: Speed limit inside the garage is 5 mph. No overnight parking without a reservation. Vehicles must not exceed 6.5 feet in height. Motorcycles have dedicated spots near the entrance on Level 1. No commercial vehicles over 20 feet in length.

title: Security
content: The garage is monitored by 24/7 CCTV surveillance. Emergency call boxes are located on every level. Security personnel patrol during staffed hours. Report any issues to the management office on Level 1.

title: Contact Information
content: Phone: (555) 123-4567. Email: parking@yahoo.com. Website: parkingassistant.com. Management office is located on Level 1 near the main entrance.
